column1: Any changes to the scope of work must be documented in writing via a Change Order form.
Change orders will be priced before work begins. No verbal change orders will be honored.

column2: [Labor and materials / Labor only / As specified]

column1: 1. Contractor will perform work in a professional manner consistent with industry standards.
2. Client will provide reasonable access to the work site during normal business hours.
3. Contractor maintains liability insurance and workers compensation coverage.
4. Any disputes will first be addressed through mediation before legal action.
5. Either party may terminate with 48 hours written notice; client pays for completed work.
